\newcommand\Address{}
\newcommand\DateOfBirth{}
\newcommand\Email{}
\newcommand\EmergencyContact{}
\newcommand\GradeLevel{}
\newcommand\GuardianContact{}
\newcommand\GuardianName{}
\newcommand\Phone{}
\newcommand\StudentID{}
\newcommand\StudentName{}

\newcommand{\FormLine}[2]{\rule{0pt}{2.4ex}\underline{\makebox[#1][l]{#2}}}

\begin{document}
\input{values.tex}
{\LARGE\bfseries STUDENT INFORMATION FORM}\par

Date of Birth: & \FormLine{2.31cm}{\DateOfBirth} & Grade Level: & \FormLine{1.28cm}{\GradeLevel} \\
Email: & \FormLine{2.95cm}{\Email} & Phone: & \FormLine{1.54cm}{\Phone} \\
Address: & \FormLine{6.22cm}{\Address} &  &  \\
Guardian Name: & \FormLine{5.58cm}{\GuardianName} &  &  \\
Guardian Contact: & \FormLine{5.26cm}{\GuardianContact} &  &  \\
Emergency Contact: & \FormLine{5.10cm}{\EmergencyContact} &  &  \\
